name: Ilia Guruli
title: Senior IT Project Manager
about: Senior IT Project Manager with 10+ years of experience leading ERP, banking, insurance, retail, and enterprise digital transformation projects. Currently leading Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central (BC) and LS Retail implementations at Prodware Georgia for large-scale retail and banking organizations.

Strong experience in managing international and cross-functional teams, ERP rollouts, stakeholder communication, Agile project delivery, and business process transformation. Proven track record of successfully implementing Microsoft Dynamics Business Central across multiple domains, including Finance, HR & Payroll, Sales/POS, Procurement, Warehouse Management, and e-commerce integrations.

Bachelor’s in Informatics, Mathematics and Natural Sciences
